prompt:
Subject: Sparkling Harajuku Pop Girl / Harajuku kawaii fashion editorial

Person/Expression: woman in her early 20s, fluffy short bob, light see-through bangs, natural clear skin, bright smile, energetic and friendly expression, natural eye contact with camera.

Clothing/Pose: oversized sweatshirt with anime-style graphics, light blue denim shorts, pastel pink cap, pastel-colored headphones around the neck, colorful bracelets and rings, a playful pose sitting while lightly lifting the cap with one hand.

Background/Lighting: butter-yellow studio background, soft softbox lighting, sunflowers, star motifs, cassette tapes, candy, stickers, a pop and cute space where magazine collage-style items float in the air.

Composition/Camera: vertical composition, fashion portrait from upper body to above knees, centered composition, 35mm lens, bright and clear studio photography, magazine cover-style composition making the subject look prominent.

Texture/Style: high definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture, glossy magazine finish, Harajuku pop fashion, kawaii streetwear editorial, Y2K pastel fashion, candy colors, clean Japanese-style fashion photography.

Negative: low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, warped body, excessive processing, overexposure, text, logo, watermark
